title: Voice memo — Mar 14 2020 (twin-bed scary movie story fragment)
html:
21-second voice memo from Mar 14 2020 (the day Oregon shut down for COVID) — Yahir and someone laughing about a "treacherous" first hangout in a twin bed watching a horror movie. grants pass teen era / covid pandemic era threshold capture; sits next to the diddles / homie cluster.

grants pass teen era · covid pandemic era · diddles · recording as note · grants pass or
